task_goal: Move the file setup_exe.exe from Pictures within the sdk_gphone_x86_64 storage area to the Download within the same sdk_gphone_x86_64 storage area in the Android filesystem.
task_goal_rewrite: The file setup_exe.exe is located in the Download folder within the sdk_gphone_x86_64 (or equivalent UI-labeled) storage area of the Android filesystem, with no remaining copy in the Pictures folder of the same storage area.

checkpoints.description: The file setup_exe.exe is selected or targeted in the Pictures folder of the sdk_gphone_x86_64 (or equivalent UI-labeled) storage area.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing setup_exe.exe highlighted or selected in the Pictures folder; trace log entry indicating selection of this specific file.

checkpoints.description: The file setup_exe.exe is present in the Download folder of the sdk_gphone_x86_64 (or equivalent UI-labeled) storage area, and no longer exists in the Pictures folder of the same storage area.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshots displaying setup_exe.exe in the Download folder and confirming its absence from the Pictures folder; trace logs verifying completion of the move operation to Download and removal from Pictures.

checkpoints.description: Evidence confirms the operation was applied to the exact target object/value and intended context stated in the goal.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Use screenshot/UI text/action evidence to disambiguate the target identity and location before final-state verification.

success_rule: Success is achieved if both required checkpoints are satisfied: the target file was correctly identified in the source Pictures folder, and it has been successfully moved to the destination Download folder with no copy left in the source folder.
